title: Full-time job (no placement drive)
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Full-time job (no placement drive)

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Log in as employer
steps.observe: Employer hub ready to publish a full-time job.

steps.label: Open Jobs and Programs
steps.observe: Job posting list and create form.

steps.label: Publish full_time job — manual
steps.observe: Set campus visibility; publish with GT- marker title if testing linkage.

steps.label: Open college Internships and Programs
steps.observe: Pending job or internship row for employer posting.

steps.label: Student browses Jobs
steps.observe: Eligible full-time job visible after approval.

steps.label: Employer reviews Applications for Jobs

steps.label: Open Applications
